name: AI Core
description: Shared AI service connections + context resolver for the ai_* widget family. Holds the Anthropic API key (used by ai_brief for text) and the Fal.ai API key (used by ai_scene for image generation). Resolves placeholders like {weather.now.temp_c}, {calendar.next.title}, {ha.entity.<entity_id>.state}, {time.day_of_week} against the live state of other widget cores. No cell of its own.

settings.name: api_key
settings.label: Anthropic API key (for ai_brief)
settings.help: Get one at https://console.anthropic.com/. Stored locally; only sent to api.anthropic.com when ai_brief renders. Claude Haiku 4.5 is the default model (~$0.00025 per brief, ~$0.18/month at hourly refresh).

settings.name: fal_api_key
settings.label: Fal.ai API key (for ai_scene)
settings.help: Get one at https://fal.ai/dashboard/keys. Stored locally; only sent to fal.run when ai_scene renders. Flux Schnell is the default model (~$0.003 per image, ~$2.20/month at hourly refresh).
